overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night during heavy rain. The player walks under an elevated highway, looks up at towering skyscrapers, and crosses a busy intersection with neon signs and reflective wet streets. The footage is from a video game with high-quality ray-traced lighting and detailed urban environments.

segments.scene_description: Walking under a concrete overpass in a futuristic city at night. The MARQUESS neon sign glows in the distance while a palm tree and yellow bench sit on the wet sidewalk. The area is sheltered from the rain, with sparse traffic visible on the road to the right.

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers above

agents.ego_description: tilting head up to view the rain falling between the tall buildings

entered.detail: Tall building with horizontal illuminated windows and golden lighting
Dark reflective glass facade with vertical architectural lines

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal a narrow gap between two massive skyscrapers. Rain falls through the opening as golden light streams from the building windows above, creating a dramatic vertical perspective.

events.description: camera returns to eye level from looking up at buildings
passing a pedestrian wearing orange holding a black umbrella

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk close to the building wall, passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: Dark metallic building facade with rain streaming down the surface
Large illuminated advertisement screen showing video content across the street

segments.scene_description: Returning to street level, the camera walks alongside a dark reflective building wall with rain running down its surface. A pedestrian with a black umbrella passes by in the opposite direction as the camera continues along the wet sidewalk.

segments.scene_description: Approaching a wide intersection, the camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk alongside other pedestrians. The MARQUESS sign is visible again across the street, while futuristic vehicles drive through the rain-slicked roads. The scene opens up to reveal the full scale of the neon-lit downtown area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sheltered shadows of a concrete overpass into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic city. It begins on a wet sidewalk beneath an overpass, passing a yellow bench and a palm tree while the MARQUESS neon sign glows in the distance. The camera then tilts sharply upward to reveal a narrow gap between towering skyscrapers, where golden light streams down through the falling rain. Returning to street level, the view glides along a dark, reflective building wall as a pedestrian with a black umbrella passes by in the opposite direction. The scene finally opens up as the camera crosses a yellow-striped intersection, moving past futuristic vehicles toward the full scale of the rain-slicked, neon-lit downtown area.
